abilities.description: Conjure a card of your choice from the Planets spellbook onto the battlefield tapped with eight charge counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Conjure a card of your choice from the Planets spellbook onto the battlefield tapped with eight charge counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: MakeCard

triggers.description: When this enchantment enters, if you control a Planet, this enchantment deals 4 damage to any target.
